props.ChoiceText: The pay was better because the load was worse than you were told.
props.ChoiceBio: Guarding dangerous cargo taught you that secrecy and pay often arrive together.

0.TransitionText: Because guarding dangerous cargo taught you that secrecy and pay often arrive together, paid violence remained the surest trade you knew.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because guarding dangerous cargo taught you that secrecy and pay often arrive together, soldiering for hire could turn into armed profit at sea under private commission.
1.TransitionPrompt: This contract work could carry you into privateering, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because guarding dangerous cargo taught you that secrecy and pay often arrive together., the setback did not end your road, and you remained in Mercenary.

0.TargetText: A carter or guard who remembers what was really moving under contract.
